choose_language:
[te] Choose your language:
1. English
2. Kannada
3. Hindi
4. Telugu
ask_market_type:
[te] Choose your market:
1. Local (India)
2. Global (Export)
3. Both
registration_restart: [te] Okay, let us restart your registration details.
main_menu_farmer:
[te] Hello {name}!
1. Sell Produce
2. My Listings
3. Wallet
4. Transaction History
5. My Orders
main_menu_buyer:
[te] Hello {name}!
1. Browse & Buy
2. My Purchases
3. Wallet
4. Transaction History
sell_ask_qty: [te] How many KG do you want to sell?
sell_ask_price: [te] Price per KG in ₹? Current mandi rate: ₹{mandi_price}/kg
sell_price_warn: [te] Your price ₹{price}/kg is unusual compared to mandi rate ₹{mandi}/kg. Reply YES to continue or NO to change.
sell_ask_pickup:
[te] Pickup method:
1. At my farm
2. Nearest mandi
3. I will deliver
sell_ask_gi_tag: [te] Add a GI tag for the global market or type SKIP.
buy_ask_crop: [te] Choose what you want to buy:
buy_escrow_locked: [te] Escrow locked for order {order_id}. Amount secured: ₹{amount}
buy_confirm_instruction: [te] Send CONFIRM {order_id} when you receive the goods.
buy_no_listings: [te] No live listings found for {crop} right now.
buy_invalid_listing: [te] Please choose one of the shown listing numbers.
buy_listing_missing: [te] That listing is no longer available.
buy_quantity_too_high: [te] Requested quantity is higher than available stock. Max available: {max_qty}kg.
delivery_confirmed_buyer: [te] Order {order_id} marked delivered. Thank you for confirming.
delivery_confirmed_farmer: [te] Delivery confirmed for {order_id}. ₹{amount} credited after platform fee.
wallet_menu:
[te] Wallet Menu:
1. Balance
2. Add Money
3. Withdraw
4. Mini Statement
wallet_add_confirm: [te] A payment request for ₹{amount} is ready. Reply YES to confirm the top-up.
wallet_add_limit: [te] This top-up would exceed your wallet balance limit.
wallet_invalid_upi: [te] Please enter a valid UPI ID like name@bank or 9876543210@upi.
my_listings_empty: [te] You do not have any listings yet.
my_orders_empty: [te] You do not have any orders yet.
insufficient_balance: [te] Insufficient balance. You have ₹{balance}, but need ₹{required}.
invalid_choice: [te] Please choose a number between 1 and {max}.
session_timeout: [te] Your session timed out. Send MENU to continue.
error_generic: [te] Something went wrong. Please try again.
action_cancelled: [te] Action cancelled. Reply MENU to continue.
notification_escrow_locked: [te] Payment of ₹{amount} is secured. Please deliver by {deadline}.
notification_wallet_credited: [te] ₹{amount} added to your wallet. New balance: ₹{balance}
notification_listing_expiring: [te] Your {crop} listing expired or is expiring soon. {qty}kg is still unsold.
notification_price_alert: [te] {crop} prices dropped to ₹{price}/kg in your area.
notification_order_dispatched: Order {order_id} for {crop} has been dispatched by the farmer.
notification_delivery_confirmed: Delivery confirmed for order {order_id}. ₹{amount} has been released to your wallet.
notification_delivery_recorded: Delivery for order {order_id} is now confirmed. Escrow of ₹{amount} has been closed.
